svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="单向数据流" id="lb2"> <mxGraphModel dx="-554" dy="-153" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1080" pageHeight="480" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="host" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="宿主（编辑器 / 业务层）
持有可变 schema" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="240" x="60" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="schema 树" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="80" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="formState 字典" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="80" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="h3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="事件处理 / 改 schema" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="200" x="80" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="engine" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;" value="渲染引擎（dumb）
只渲染 + 发事件
不持状态" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="240" x="420" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="host" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="engine" value="给 schema，渲染画布"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="engine" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;dashed=1;" target="host" value="用户操作 → 发事件
node:create / node:move ..."> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="comp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0f766e;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;verticalAlign=top;" value="Vue 组件库（共用）
props + slot 驱动
不知自己被谁渲染" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="220" x="780" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="engine" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=block;" target="comp" value="registry 查组件渲染"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;" value="关键：引擎手里没有「可变的 schema」，只有「当前 props 那一份」。改 schema 是宿主的事，引擎只负责反映。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="880" x="100" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#0f766e;fontSize=12;" value="因为单向 + 无状态，引擎可以配 Vue 宿主、React 宿主、甚至后端渲染宿主。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="880" x="100" y="355" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
宿主（编辑器 / 业务层）
持有可变 schema

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 238px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 361px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
渲染引擎（dumb）
只渲染 + 发事件
不持状态

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(15, 118, 110), rgb(86, 174, 167));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 27px; margin-left: 721px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Vue 组件库（共用）
props + slot 驱动
不知自己被谁渲染

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 257px; margin-left: 480px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-style: italic; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 关键：引擎手里没有「可变的 schema」，只有「当前 props 那一份」。改 schema 是宿主的事，引擎只负责反映。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 302px; margin-left: 480px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #0f766e;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0f766e, #56aea7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 因为单向 + 无状态，引擎可以配 Vue 宿主、React 宿主、甚至后端渲染宿主。
